steps.title: Identify the comparison
steps.content: The underlined phrase follows the description of color filters placed on mantises' faces. By comparing those filters to familiar 3D movie glasses, the phrase helps readers picture the experimental setup.

steps.title: Reject misread functions
steps.content: Choice A says the phrase emphasizes a difference, but much like signals similarity. Choice B invents a research problem. Choice D says the researchers used 3D glasses, but the text only compares their filters to them. The remaining choice correctly describes an explanatory comparison. The answer is C.
